tasks.label: Diagnose ribbon order
tasks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$appCs = 'C:\Users\1M06174\OneDrive - SENER\repos\BIMTools\BIMTools\App.cs'; . .\Publish-Docs.ps1 -SourceRoot 'C:\Users\1M06174\OneDrive - SENER\repos\BIMTools\BIMTools' -DestRoot 'C:\Users\1M06174\OneDrive - SENER\repos\BIMTools\publish\SnrBim.github.io' 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern 'Loaded ribbon|Ribbon: |not found'"

tasks.label: Test App.cs regex
tasks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$lines = Get-Content 'C:\Users\1M06174\OneDrive - SENER\repos\BIMTools\BIMTools\App.cs'; $m = $lines | Select-String -Pattern 'CreateButton.*new\s+(\w+)\.(Command\w*)'; Write-Host ('Total CreateButton matches: ' + $m.Count); $m | Select-Object -First 5 | ForEach-Object { Write-Host $_.Line }"

tasks.label: Run Publish-Docs with button text check
Git status docs icons
tasks.command: cd 'C:\Users\1M06174\OneDrive - SENER\repos\BIMTools\publish\SnrBim.github.io'; git status docs/fill-code/ docs/create-openings/; git ls-files --others --ignored --exclude-standard docs/fill-code/ docs/create-openings/

tasks.label: Rename Logo.png to logo.png
tasks.command: cd 'C:\Users\1M06174\OneDrive - SENER\repos\BIMTools\publish\SnrBim.github.io'; git mv docs/create-openings/Logo.png docs/create-openings/logo.png; git mv docs/fill-code/Logo.png docs/fill-code/logo.png; git status

tasks.label: Find all Logo.png in git
tasks.command: cd 'C:\Users\1M06174\OneDrive - SENER\repos\BIMTools\publish\SnrBim.github.io'; git ls-files docs/ | grep -i logo
